name: Shaved Fennel with Blood Oranges, Pomegranates & Pecorino
recipeIngredient: 2 large round bulbs of fennel, trimmed, rinsed and dried
4 large blood oranges, pith and seeds removed
1 pomegranate, rind removed and seeds extracted
recipeInstructions:
1. Shave fennel on a mandolin or slicer to 1/32 inch thick and toss with lemon juice and extra virgin olive oil in a large metal mixing bowl. Refrigerate.
2. Remove pith and skin from blood oranges, cut into segments, and remove seeds. Save all juices. Toss orange segments into the fennel mixture, add pomegranates, and gently mix.
3. Arrange 4 tall piles of the mixture in 4 separate plates. Shave pecorino over each plate and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
